creator: chris@calldei.com
text:
On Fri, Dec 03, 1999, Oleg V. Volkov wrote:
> --- sh.1.old	Thu Sep  2 16:09:48 1999
> +++ sh.1	Fri Dec  3 05:04:05 1999
> @@ -48,7 +48,8 @@
>  .Op Fl c Ar string
>  .Op Ar arg ...
>  .Sh DESCRIPTION
> -.Nm Sh
> +A
> +.Nm sh

   ``A sh is ...'' makes even less sense than ``Sh is ...'',
don't you think?

-- 
|Chris Costello <chris@calldei.com>
|Revolutionary: The disk drives go round and round.
